name: key_photos
description: Find organic social media posts where people photograph their physical keys

dorks.name: reddit_key_photos
queries: site:reddit.com "my keys" OR "new keys" OR "found a key" filetype:jpg
site:reddit.com/r/pics "my key" OR "house key" OR "car key"
site:reddit.com "got my keys" OR "first set of keys" -stock -shutterstock
site:reddit.com "key cutting" OR "copy of my key" image

dorks.name: linkedin_key_posts
queries: site:linkedin.com "got my keys" OR "received my keys" OR "new office keys"
site:linkedin.com "handed the keys" OR "here are my keys"

dorks.name: twitter_key_photos
queries: site:twitter.com "got the keys" OR "got my keys" pic.twitter

dorks.name: facebook_instagram
queries: site:facebook.com "got my keys" OR "new keys" photo

dorks.name: image_hosting
queries: site:imgur.com "key" house OR door OR office

dorks.name: forums_classifieds
queries: "I found a key" site:nextdoor.com OR site:reddit.com photo
